title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Poorvika Mobiles

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Poorvika Mobiles
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Poorvika Mobiles in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Poorvika Mobiles:
Poorvika Mobiles is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poorvika Mobiles!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
